scripts.check: bun run check:public-agent && bun run check:agent-proxy
scripts.check:agent-proxy: cd services/agent-model-proxy && bun test test/*.test.ts && bunx tsc --noEmit
scripts.check:public-agent: bun test scripts/public-agent-decision.test.ts scripts/github-agent-session.test.ts scripts/github-agent-publish.test.ts scripts/public-agent-triage.test.ts scripts/public-agent-control.test.ts scripts/public-agent-production.test.ts scripts/public-agent-planner.test.ts && bunx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck --moduleResolution Bundler --module ESNext --target ES2022 --types bun scripts/public-agent-bundle.ts scripts/public-agent-decision.ts scripts/github-agent-session.ts scripts/github-agent-publish.ts scripts/model-proxy-mint.ts scripts/model-proxy-exchange.ts scripts/public-agent-triage.ts scripts/codex-agent-run.ts scripts/scaffold-target-repo.ts scripts/public-agent-command.ts scripts/public-agent-target.ts scripts/public-agent-ci.ts scripts/public-agent-review.ts scripts/public-agent-merge-gate.ts scripts/public-agent-loop-budget.ts scripts/public-agent-policy.ts scripts/public-agent-context.ts scripts/public-agent-pm.ts scripts/public-agent-dispatcher.ts scripts/public-agent-control.ts scripts/public-agent-control-files.ts scripts/public-agent-planner.ts scripts/public-agent-decision-index.ts scripts/public-agent-decision.test.ts scripts/github-agent-session.test.ts scripts/github-agent-publish.test.ts scripts/public-agent-triage.test.ts scripts/public-agent-control.test.ts scripts/public-agent-production.test.ts scripts/public-agent-planner.test.ts
